scripts.build:host-local: npm run sync:package-paths && npm run build:core && npm run build -w @nile/host-local
scripts.build:cli: npm run sync:package-paths && npm run build -w @nile/cli
scripts.desktop:build: npm run sync:package-paths && npm run build -w @nile/desktop
scripts.desktop:dev: npm run sync:package-paths && npm run dev -w @nile/desktop
scripts.desktop:start: npm run sync:package-paths && npm run start -w @nile/desktop
scripts.test:core: npm run sync:package-paths && vitest run packages/core/src packages/agents packages/builtins packages/connections
scripts.test:host-local: npm run build:host-local && vitest run packages/host-local/src
scripts.test:cli: npm run build:host-local && vitest run apps/cli/src
scripts.test:desktop: npm run build:host-local && vitest run apps/desktop/src
scripts.test: npm run test:core && npm run test:host-local && npm run test:cli && npm run test:desktop
scripts.typecheck: npm run sync:package-paths && npm run build:host-local && tsc -p tsconfig.node.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.renderer.json --noEmit
scripts.verify:pre-push: npm run verify:structure && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run desktop:build
